rules.name: Potential hardcoded secret
rules.recommendation: Move secrets to Kubernetes Secrets, Jenkins credentials, or a cloud secret manager. Never commit real credentials.

rules.name: Weak random generator for security-sensitive code
rules.recommendation: Use java.security.SecureRandom for token, password, OTP, nonce, or security-sensitive generation.

rules.name: Possible SQL string concatenation
rules.recommendation: Use prepared statements, Spring Data repositories, or parameterized queries instead of SQL string concatenation.

rules.name: Wildcard CORS origin
rules.recommendation: Restrict CORS origins to approved frontend domains.

rules.name: Actuator endpoints may be overexposed
rules.recommendation: Expose only health and info publicly. Protect sensitive actuator endpoints with authentication and network restrictions.

rules.name: Plain HTTP endpoint in config
rules.recommendation: Use HTTPS for external service communication.
